tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression confirmation: no script advances .current_phase from 0->1 or 1->2 after gate passes. check-phase-gate.sh is read-only consistency check. Manually patched .current_phase=2 to continue protocol.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: 1) bash scripts/process-checklist.sh --start-phase1; 2) complete each phase1 step via --complete-step; 3) bash scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; 4) cat .claude/phase-state.json — .current_phase remains 0
framework_bugs.expected: After all phase1 steps complete and gate passes, some script should advance .current_phase from 0 to 1 (and similarly 1->2)
framework_bugs.actual: check-phase-gate.sh is consistency-only; no documented script auto-advances. Re-confirms U-D from prior sweep is still open.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: scripts/process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' (no active loop) returned RC=1 with the BL-006 block message — gate works through the documented hook path. Direct shell git commit bypasses PreToolUse (U-C, still open).

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 and starting a new uat-feat-2 build loop, --check-commit-message 'feat(uat-2): impl' returned RC=0 (PR #17 BL-006 grace fix working)

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with valid {question, options, recommendation, offered_at} schema; PreToolUse pre-commit-gate.sh returned permissionDecision=deny with the rich-format reason

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh run no longer blocks on BL-015

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .features_completed in .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-1'

documentation_gaps.gap: U-C confirmation: BL-006 enforcement only fires through Claude Code PreToolUse path (process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message). Direct shell `git commit` (with or without --no-verify) bypasses BL-006 entirely. Suggest documenting installing a real .git/hooks/commit-msg hook so CLI commits are also gated, or stating explicitly in builders-guide BL-010 that the gate is harness-bound.
documentation_gaps.where: docs/reference/builders-guide.md (BL-010 / 'MVP Cutline Work Requires the Build Loop' section); scripts/process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message

summary: sponsored_poc/desktop/light/rust base agent ran clean against framework HEAD d66e8f2: PR #17/#18/#19 fixes (U-A, U-E, U-F, U-H, U-N, U-O, BL-006 grace, BL-015 sentinel) all confirmed working. Re-confirmed U-D (no script auto-advances current_phase after gate passes) at Medium and U-C (BL-006 bypassed by direct shell git commit) as a documentation gap. Phase 4 correctly blocked for sponsored_poc deployments by design. No framework contamination.
